top_signals.title: SpaceX aborts Starship test flight, sending stock lower
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days."  SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
